REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING DEPT. 501 - PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT'S MOTION TO SUBSTITUTE PAINTIFF JANESTA DOWNEY, TRUSTEE OF THE LIZA DENISE SWIFT LIVING TRUST, IN PLACE OF DECEASED PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 27, 2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 501. BY NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 13, 2019, MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ADDRESSING: (1) THE OUTCOME OF ALAMEDA PROBATE HEARING; AND (2) WHETHER ON THE DATE OF HER DEATH, PLAINTIFF, AS INDIVIDUAL (THE ONLY CAPACITY IN WHICH THIS CASE WAS BROUGHT) HAD STANDING (I.E. OWNERSHIP) TO PURSUE THIS ACTION IN LIGHT OF THE ALLEGED OWNERSHIP TRANSFER TO THE TRUST (I.E. TRUSTEE BECOMING THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST); (3) IF PLAINTIFF HAD NO STANDING IN HER INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY, WAS SHE PROPERLY IN THE CASE IN HER CAPACITY AS A TRUSTEE AT THE TIME OF HER DEATH; (4) IF PLAINTIFF HAD NO STANDING AT THE TIME OF HER DEATH, CAN HER SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST BECOME A NEW PLAINTIFF IN THE CASE OR SUBSTITUTION OF PLAINTIFF MUST BE REQUESTED BY OTHER MEAN, E.G. CCP 367, 473. BY NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 20, 2019 RESPONDING PARTY MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION ADDRESSING THE ISSUE LISTED ABOVE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT NOTICE LOF MOTION, AND MOTION, TO SUBSTITUTE PAINTIFF JANESTA DOWNEY, TRUSTEE OF THE LIZA DENISE SWIFT LIVING TRUST, IN PLACE OF DECEASED PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR UNTIL SUCH TIME THAT A PROBATE COURT DETERMINES WHETHER THE PROPERTY AT ISSUE IN THIS ACTION (2727 BALBOA), IS AN ASSET OF THE TRUST. IF IT IS DETERMINED THAT THE PROPERTY IS AN ASSET OF THE TRUST, A TRUSTEE MAY TAKE APPROPRIATE STEPS TO PROCEED IN THIS ACTION AS A SUCCESSOR OWNER TO THE ORIGINAL PLAINTIFF. IF IT IS DETERMINED THAT THE PROPERTY WAS NOT IN THE TRUST AT THE TIME OF THE DECEDENT'S DEATH, AFTER TAKING ANY NECESSARY STEPS, A PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF INDIVIDUAL DECEDENT'S SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST MAY RENEW THIS MOTION. IN LIGHT OF THE FACTS OF THIS CASE A DETERMINATION BY A PROBATE COURT IS NECESSARY REGARDING THIS ASSET. THIS COURT WILL NOT BE MAKING SUCH DETERMINATION. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Lof Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT Notice Lof Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift is taken off calendar until such time that a Probate Court determines whether the Property at issue in this action (2727 Balboa), is an asset of the Trust. If it is determined that the Property is an asset of the Trust, a trustee may take appropriate steps to proceed in this action as a successor owner to the original Plaintiff. If it is determined that the Property was not in the Trust at the time of the decedent's death, after taking any necessary steps, a personal representative of the estate of individual decedent's successor in interest may renew this motion. In light of the facts of this case a determination by a Probate Court is necessary regarding this asset. This Court will not be making such determination. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Partition Cause Of Action
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Lof Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Continued To Sep-27-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT's Motion To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift is CONTINUED to September 27, 2019 AT 9:30 AM in Department 501.

By no later than September 13, 2019, moving party to submit a supplemental brief addressing: (1) the outcome of Alameda Probate hearing; and (2) whether on the date of her death, Plaintiff, as individual (the only capacity in which this case was brought) had standing (i.e. ownership) to pursue this action in light of the alleged ownership transfer to the Trust (i.e. trustee becoming the real party in interest); (3) if Plaintiff had no standing in her individual capacity, was she properly in the case in her capacity as a trustee at the time of her death; (4) if Plaintiff had no standing at the time of her death, can her successor in interest become a new plaintiff in the case or substitution of plaintiff must be requested by other mean, e.g. CCP 367, 473. By no later than September 20, 2019 responding party may file a supplemental opposition addressing the issue listed above.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)
